context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 51 auto-assign components feature fully verified. Backend API tests confirm: (1) empty assigned_components auto-assigns all signable fields, (2) explicit assignments respected, (3) two recipients with both empty - first gets all, second gets none, (4) R1 explicit + R2 empty - R2 gets remaining, (5) package mode auto-assign works, (6) package send endpoint auto-assign works. Logging patterns verified in backend logs. Frontend info banner code verified via code review (lines 809-819 in GenerateDocumentWizard.js).
